description_long: This maintenance worker is depicted as a male figure dressed in a light gray uniform with tan suspenders, a tan codpiece, and black boots. He wears a gray bowler hat and dark sunglasses, giving him a distinctive and somewhat stylized appearance. The figure's uniform is form-fitting, with visible seams and cuffs, and he has a wristwatch on his left wrist. Accessories include a black cane with a gold knob and a cylindrical white object, both positioned beside him. The overall look is more theatrical than practical, with no visible high-visibility markings or standard safety gear. The figure's posture is upright and neutral, with arms slightly bent and hands open.
description: A male maintenance worker in a light gray uniform with tan suspenders, black boots, a gray bowler hat, and sunglasses, accompanied by a cane and a cylindrical object.
description_view_0: Front view shows the worker's face, sunglasses, bowler hat, suspenders, codpiece, boots, and both accessories clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, facial features, suspenders, and the cylindrical object beside the figure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, suspenders, codpiece, and boots, with both accessories visible to the left.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the hat, suspenders, and boots, with the cane and cylindrical object not visible.
attribute_uniform_type: light gray fitted shirt and pants with tan suspenders and codpiece, black boots, and a gray bowler hat
